title: Spear vs Rod Fishing
subtitle: Two ways to take the catch

pages.text: &6Spear fishing&r is the oldest harvest. A spear tied to fiber rope is thrown at fish in the shallows and hauled back, catch and all. A spear fisher works from shore and needs only a spear — the cheapest fishing path to set up.

&6Rod fishing&r comes with the Fishery research. A rod fisher casts a line and waits, and is the steady, higher-yield path. When a rod fisher can reach deep water — via Sailing and a raft — bites come roughly twice as fast as from the shoreline.
When the rod fisher unlocks, your spear fishers migrate to it. Fishing is one of the cleanest answers to the Starvation crisis because it does not wait on fields or herds to mature.
